zh.Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.Wiverton, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾阿爾福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Chaworth於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Thomas de Chaworth22歲，母親Alice Houby20歲。他於大約1330年與Jane Luttrell結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1360年在英國萊希斯特斯爾被列為mp。他去世於大約1371年在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Chaworth于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Chaworth22岁，母亲Alice Houby20岁。他于大约1330年与Jane Luttrell结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1360年在英国萊希斯特斯爾被列为mp。他去世于大约1371年在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Chaworth was born about 1310, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Chaworth, was 22 and his mother, Alice Houby, was 20. He married Jane Luttrell about 1330. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1360, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as mp in Leicestershire, England. He died about 1371, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Chaworth est né environ 1310, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Chaworth, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Houby, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jane Luttrell environ 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1360, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mp à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1371, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Chaworth um 1310 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Chaworth 22 und seine Mutter Alice Houby 20. Er hat um 1330 Jane Luttrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1360, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mp in Leicestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1371 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Chaworth è nato il circa 1310 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Chaworth, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alice Houby, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jane Luttrell circa 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1360, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mp nel Leicestershire, England. Morì circa 1371, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworthが約1310年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Chaworthは22歳，母Alice Houbyは20歳であった。約1330年にJane Luttrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1360年，51歳の時，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでの職業はmpと記録されている。彼は約1371年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Chaworth(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Houby(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1330년 Jane Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1360년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 레이스스터실르에서 mp이었다. 그는 대략 1371년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Chaworth, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice Houby, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Luttrell aproximadamente 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1360, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como mp em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1371, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Chaworth родился около 1310 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Chaworth было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Houby, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Luttrell около 1330 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1360 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии mp в местности лисестиршир, Англия. Он умер около 1371 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Chaworth nació aproximadamente 1310, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Chaworth, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice Houby, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jane Luttrell aproximadamente 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1360, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era mp en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1371, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
